title: coronilla elegans
intro: Coronilla elegans, also known as French lavender or clover, is a flowering plant species in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. Coronilla elegans is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
